**Which section or procedure?**
e.g. "Albumin description in French"

**What is the issue?**
Describe what is inaccurate, unclear, or could be improved.

**Suggested improvement**
Your proposed wording or correction.

**Source (if applicable)**
Link or reference supporting your suggestion, especially for medical content.

**Language affected**
- [ ] German
- [ ] English
- [ ] Spanish
- [ ] French
